name: Diamond Business Loans
description_short: Diamond Business Loans is a Los Angeles-based private commercial lender offering SBA loans, merchant cash advances, equipment financing, and lines of credit up to $250,000 to small businesses.
description_long:
Diamond Business Loans is a Los Angeles-based private commercial lender and structured finance company that has been operating since at least 2015, when they began tracking their funding volume. They hold a California Department of Business Oversight Financing Law License (60DBO-45531) and maintain an A+ rating with the Better Business Bureau. The company positions itself as a one-stop shop for business financing across multiple loan types and business stages.

The company offers a comprehensive suite of business financing products including SBA loans (with Preferred Financial Services designation for faster processing), small business loans, equipment leasing and financing, merchant cash advances, lines of credit up to $250,000, accounts receivable financing, real estate financing, startup business financing, business acquisition financing, and debt restructuring services. Their line of credit program launched in 2024 and features 12 monthly or 26 weekly payment options with no prepayment penalties. They advertise $726+ million in total fundings since 2015.

Diamond Business Loans distinguishes itself through its Preferred Financial Services designation from SBA lenders, claiming faster loan processing than competitors. They emphasize personalized service with named loan officers (Christian, David, Ralph, etc.) featured in customer testimonials. The company highlights flexible repayment terms, including weekly payment options for merchant cash advances, and debt restructuring services that convert daily payment loans to monthly or weekly schedules while lowering rates. Their startup financing requires only credit-based qualification with no income documentation or prior operator experience required.

Based on available website information, the company appears legitimate with proper licensing and documented customer reviews on multiple platforms (Yelp, Facebook, Mopro). However, prospective borrowers should note that specific APR ranges, qualification requirements, and funding timelines are not disclosed on the website. The company's merchant cash advance product, while flexible, typically carries higher costs than traditional loans. Customers should contact them directly for detailed terms and compare rates with other SBA-approved lenders before committing.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: A+ BBB rating with 5-star Yelp and Facebook reviews demonstrating strong customer satisfaction
SBA Preferred Financial Services designation claims faster loan processing than typical SBA lenders
Lines of credit up to $250,000 with flexible payment options (12 monthly or 26 weekly payments) and no prepayment fees
Diverse product suite including startup financing with no income documentation required, appealing to newer businesses
$726+ million in cumulative fundings since 2015 demonstrates substantial lending track record
Debt restructuring services convert daily payment loans to monthly/weekly options while claiming to lower rates
California Department of Business Oversight licensed (60DBO-45531) providing regulatory legitimacy
cons: Website does not disclose APR ranges, origination fees, or specific cost comparisons for any loan products
Merchant cash advance product details are vague; this product type typically carries significantly higher effective interest rates than traditional loans
No information provided about minimum credit scores, revenue requirements, or time-in-business eligibility thresholds
Funding timelines not specified for any product despite 'swift' claims for merchant cash advances
Limited transparency on qualification criteria for startup financing despite claiming 'no income documentation required'
best_for: Small business owners seeking SBA loans who want faster processing through a Preferred Financial Services lender
Established businesses needing flexible working capital solutions like lines of credit or equipment financing
Startups with limited operating history but established personal credit seeking business funding without income documentation
Businesses with daily sales looking for merchant cash advance solutions with flexible repayment structures
diagnosis: Diamond Business Loans is best for small business owners and startups seeking multiple financing options from a single lender, particularly those interested in SBA loans or equipment financing. The main caveat is that the website lacks transparent pricing information (APR, fees, funding timelines), so customers must call (888-620-3800) or email (info@diamondbl.com) to obtain actual loan terms before committing.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 325 N Maple Dr #17777, Beverly Hills, CA 90209
